gg.best_motion_picture_drama.notes: Drama slate has been 5-6 nominees in modern era; recent ceremonies (e.g. 82nd, 83rd) used 6

gg.best_motion_picture_musical_comedy.notes: Musical/Comedy slate has been 5-6 nominees in modern era; recent ceremonies used 6

gg.best_motion_picture_animated.notes: Inaugural slate (2007) was 3 nominees; later expanded. 83rd GG had 6.

era_overrides.reason: Inaugural year of category — only 3 nominees (Cars, Happy Feet, Monster House).

gg.best_motion_picture_non_english.notes: Renamed from Best Foreign Language Film at 79th GG (2022). Slate size mostly stable at 5-6.

gg.best_actor_drama.notes: Acting categories typically 5-6 nominees. Display name changed at 83rd (2026) to 'Best Male Actor...'

gg.best_actress_drama.notes: Acting categories typically 5-6 nominees. Display name changed at 83rd (2026) to 'Best Female Actor...'

gg.best_supporting_actor.notes: Display name changed at 83rd (2026) to 'Best Supporting Male Actor...'

gg.best_supporting_actress.notes: Display name changed at 83rd (2026) to 'Best Supporting Female Actor...'

gg.best_screenplay.notes: Multi-author screenplay credits common — co-recipient teams listed together; not split into separate rows

gg.best_original_score.notes: Hiatus 1954-1958 pre-dates scope window. Continuous since 1959.

gg.best_original_song.notes: Wikipedia format: '"Song" (writers) – ''Film''' — writers listed BEFORE the dash, film AFTER. subject_title populated with song name.

gg.cinematic_box_office_achievement.notes: New category introduced at 81st GG (2024). Limited history (2024-present). Slate size 8 confirmed at 81st, 82nd, and 83rd ceremonies.
